name: Community Financial Services Bank
description_short: Community Financial Services Bank is a Western Kentucky-based community bank offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and digital banking services with local, in-house customer service.
description_long:
Community Financial Services Bank (CFSB) operates as a regional community bank serving Western Kentucky with the tagline "Your Life. Your Bank." The institution emphasizes local decision-making and personalized service through its in-house client service center, distinguishing itself from larger national banks. The company maintains an active corporate culture, regularly promoting team members and recruiting new talent to support growth.

CFSB offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, personal loans for auto/boat/RV purchases, home loans with fixed and variable rates, HELOCs, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), and personal Mastercard credit cards. Their digital banking platform includes mobile wallet functionality, card controls, bill pay, budgeting tools, and expense tracking. The bank also provides alternative access channels such as Live Teller Machines (LTM) for video-based transactions, telephone banking available 24/7, and free coin-counting machines at branch locations.

The bank differentiates itself through customer-centric features and local service. They offer no monthly service fees on personal checking accounts, free debit cards, and free digital banking. Their Live Teller Machine technology allows customers to conduct transactions via video chat with centrally located tellers during non-business hours. The company emphasizes security features including fraud detection that flags out-of-area transactions and allows customers to set travel notes independently through digital banking. CFSB maintains a routing number (083903328) and accepts both Mastercard and Discover debit cards.

As a regional community bank, CFSB's main limitation is geographic scope—services appear limited to Western Kentucky markets. The bank does not appear to offer business banking products based on website content, though a business enrollment option exists. Customers in other regions will not have access to physical branch services or the local relationship banking that CFSB emphasizes as its core value proposition. The institution operates with traditional banking hours, though digital and telephone services provide 24/7 alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with no monthly service fees
Personal savings accounts with competitive interest rates
Home loans and mortgages with fixed and variable rate options
Personal loans for auto, boat, RV, and ATV purchases
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Personal Mastercard and Discover debit cards
Mobile wallet for secure contactless transactions
Digital banking with bill pay, budgeting tools, and expense tracking
Live Teller Machine (LTM) video-based transaction service
Free coin-counting service at branch locations
pros: No monthly service fees on personal checking accounts with free debit card and digital banking
24/7 telephone banking available at 270-527-2222 for balance inquiries and transactions
Live Teller Machine (LTM) technology enables video-based transactions outside business hours
Free coin-counting machines available at all branch locations
Competitive CD and IRA rates with flexible term options
In-house client service center ensures local decision-making and personalized support
Card Controls feature allows real-time debit card management through digital platform
cons: Limited to Western Kentucky geographic markets only—not a regional or national bank
No indication of business banking products or commercial lending services on website
Limited information about credit card rewards or benefits beyond basic Mastercard functionality
Mobile wallet limited to CFSB debit cards only; no third-party card support mentioned
Routing number disclosure suggests smaller institution with potentially limited ATM network
best_for: Western Kentucky residents seeking relationship-based banking with local service and no checking account fees
Customers who value 24/7 digital and telephone banking access without monthly charges
Home buyers in Kentucky seeking competitive fixed or variable-rate mortgages from a community lender
Personal loan borrowers needing vehicle, boat, RV, or ATV financing with local loan processing
diagnosis: CFSB is best suited for Western Kentucky residents who prioritize relationship banking, local decision-making, and fee-free checking over national brand recognition or extensive geographic reach. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—this bank only serves Western Kentucky markets, making it unavailable to consumers outside this region. Customers should verify branch locations and service areas before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
